title: onychium moupinense var. moupinense
intro: Onychium moupinense var. moupinense, a species of the genus Onychium in the family Aspidiaceae, is a type of fern native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Onychium moupinense var. moupinense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and powdering the fronds, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
